beats: Water starts dripping from the sink faucet
Each drip sounds like a ticking clock
The room feels narrower, protagonist covers ears

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 水槽开始滴水，滴声像秒针，把房间切得很窄。

prompt.positive: Close-up of a kitchen sink faucet dripping water, slow motion, each drop visible, protagonist's hand covering ears in background, claustrophobic framing, dim blue-gray lighting, tense atmosphere, cinematic
prompt.negative: bright, cheerful, wide shot, no water
